summary: Plan-only PR remediation inventory. No GitHub mutations are planned because comment/label/close are blocked, and no PR has complete merge preflight proof including Codex /review. Non-security PRs are classified as related or needs_human with concrete blockers; the one hydrated security-sensitive linked issue is routed centrally.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked item must be quarantined without blocking unrelated non-security PR classification.
Useful focused contributor PR, but merge is blocked until review-bot comments are addressed or explicitly resolved and Codex /review passes.
The PR may still be useful but needs current-main overlap review against merged #91488 before any merge recommendation.
Human security/product judgment is required before using backlog automation to advance a PR that directly resolves a quarantined security-sensitive report.
Focused useful contributor PR; re-run current merge preflight and Codex /review before merge.
Narrow follow-up to a closed broad docs PR; needs current rebase/preflight and Codex /review before merge.
Broad message-delivery behavior change with prior needs-changes review; maintainer judgment is needed before repair or merge planning.
Potentially useful focused hardening PR, but the failed Android check and missing Codex /review block merge.
Small focused PR, but current dependency-guard/rebase state and Codex /review must be refreshed before merge.
API/contract change with explicit product-decision label requires maintainer judgment before merge or replacement planning.
Useful focused contributor PR, but prior needs-changes review and missing Codex /review block merge.

needs_human: #82495: direct fix for quarantined security-sensitive #68170 needs central security/maintainer decision before ProjectClownfish advances it.
#82870: broad message-delivery behavior change has a prior needs-changes review and should be maintainer-decided before repair/merge.
#82985: plugin SDK memory contract/API change is linked to an issue labeled needs-product-decision.
